gcp.certificatemanager.projects.location.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

required.description: The resource that owns the locations collection, if applicable.

produces_fields.note: resource identity — use as name/parent param for .get()

gcp.certificatemanager.projects.location.description: Gets details of a single CertificateMap.

required.description: Required. A name of the certificate map to describe. Must be in the format `projects/*/locations/*/certificateMaps/*`.

can_come_from.note: [tier 1/exact] call gcp.certificatemanager.projects.locations.certificateMaps.list, iterate response["certificateMaps"][], extract item["name"] → fill {certificateMapId}
